name: Korn Ferry
description: Korn Ferry is a global organizational consulting firm that helps clients synchronize their strategy, operations, and talent to drive superior performance. Founded in 1969 and headquartered in Los Angeles, California, the company provides a wide range of services including executive search, leadership development, organizational design, and total rewards consulting. By leveraging deep expertise and data-driven insights, Korn Ferry assists organizations in unlocking the potential of their people and navigating complex business transformations to accelerate growth and achieve sustainable success in an evolving global marketplace.
